## Public Docs PR Checklist

- [ ] This change stays inside the public-safe boundary.
- [ ] This change does not expose internal routes, private dashboards, or operator-only procedures.
- [ ] This change does not introduce secret, signing, or credential-shaped examples.
- [ ] `npm run lint:public-docs` passed.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passed.
- [ ] `npm run build` passed.
